rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It inspected the Elasticsearch cluster's current configuration (cluster settings, snapshot repos, keystore, node attributes, ILM, shard routing), identified all non-default settings, authored a comprehensive 7-section rollback.sh script covering those settings, and stored it in the required ConfigMap 'rollback-rehearsal'. The oracle explicitly passes for stage_07 with a 14101-char script. Critically, the agent made only 1 Kubernetes mutation (creating the ConfigMap), leaving the live cluster untouched — confirmed by final cluster health check showing green status with 3 nodes. The regression sweep failures in stage_01/stage_02 are pre-existing workflow composition issues (the 5-pod count reflects prior stages adding es-data-new), not caused by this agent's actions.
